{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hotel Housekeeper",
  "description": "Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suites.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Housekeeper
Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Clean rooms, bathrooms, common areas [ dust, mop, disinfect]
	Change linens, restock amenities [toiletries, towel]
	Ensure hygiene standard, spotless bathrooms
	Be friendly, responsive to requests.


Requirements


	Anyone can apply, but SSCE Holder at least
	Must be 18 years and above
	Basic knowledge of cleaning chemical equipment is a plus
	Proximity to work location Ogba, Agege, Ikeja, Ojodu Berger, Akute, Ketu axis.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@hotelcapitol.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Hotel Housekeeper Job at Hotel Capitol




        
    

        
        Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suites.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Housekeeper
Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Clean rooms, bathrooms, common areas [ dust, mop, disinfect]
	Change linens, restock amenities [toiletries, towel]
	Ensure hygiene standard, spotless bathrooms
	Be friendly, responsive to requests.


Requirements


	Anyone can apply, but SSCE Holder at least
	Must be 18 years and above
	Basic knowledge of cleaning chemical equipment is a plus
	Proximity to work location Ogba, Agege, Ikeja, Ojodu Berger, Akute, Ketu axis.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Officer (Entry Level)",
  "description": "Integrated Health Care Limited is a limited liability company incorporated to carry out the business of health management services. The company with RC No 372504 was incorporated in 2000 by the Corporate Affairs Commission, Abuja under the Companies and Allied Matters Act, 1990. Our over 21 years experience and a skilled workforce have positioned us as HMO of choice as we have consistently delivered quality health care services to our clients all over the Country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer (Entry Level)

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	An OND / NCE in Marketing, Business Administration,Communications, or a related field.
	1 - 3 years of experience in marketing, preferably in a healthcare or insurance setting.
	Industry Knowledge (Desirable): Knowledge of HMO operations and healthcare systems is an added advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools, social media platforms, and content management systems.
	Basic knowledge of SEO, Google Analytics, email marketing tools, and relevant software.
	Creative thinking and strong attention to detail.
	Teamwork and collaboration.
	Empathy and professionalism.
	Organizational and time management skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: careers.abuja@yahoo.com",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-08",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Marketing Officer (Entry Level) Job at Integrated Health Care Limited




        
    

        
        Integrated Health Care Limited is a limited liability company incorporated to carry out the business of health management services. The company with RC No 372504 was incorporated in 2000 by the Corporate Affairs Commission, Abuja under the Companies and Allied Matters Act, 1990. Our over 21 years experience and a skilled workforce have positioned us as HMO of choice as we have consistently delivered quality health care services to our clients all over the Country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer (Entry Level)

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	An OND / NCE in Marketing, Business Administration,Communications, or a related field.
	1 - 3 years of experience in marketing, preferably in a healthcare or insurance setting.
	Industry Knowledge (Desirable): Knowledge of HMO operations and healthcare systems is an added advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools, social media platforms, and content management systems.
	Basic knowledge of SEO, Google Analytics, email marketing tools, and relevant software.
	Creative thinking and strong attention to detail.
	Teamwork and collaboration.
	Empathy and professionalism.
	Organizational and time management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected]    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Specialist & Website Manager",
  "description": "DMW Engineering is a large-scale industrial equipment and supplying enterprise specialized in Agricultural Equipment, Construction Machinery, Drilling and Mining Machines and other equipment. Incorporated on 3rd of March, 2009, it shares the philosophy of total quality and commitment with the development of those communities where it operates and maximum respect for execution terms and clients budgets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Specialist &amp; Website Manager

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Build, manage, and update the company websites.
	Handle website maintenance and troubleshoot technical issues.
	Improve site speed, performance, and user experience UX.
	Manage web hosting, domain, and company email accounts.
	Ensure website security and regular backups.
	Add/update content in coordination with Sales &amp; Marketing team.


Requirements


	Proven experience building and managing websites on WordPress or other CMS platforms.
	Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript is a plus.
	Experience with web hosting and cPanel.
	Organized, fast learner, and able to work under pressure.
	Lagos-based candidates preferred.


Benefits


	Competitive salary based on experience.
	Stable work environment + continuous training.
	Career growth opportunities within the company.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: sendcv2dmw@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-08",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "DMW Engineering Limited"

IT Specialist & Website Manager Job at DMW Engineering Limited




        
    

        
        DMW Engineering is a large-scale industrial equipment and supplying enterprise specialized in Agricultural Equipment, Construction Machinery, Drilling and Mining Machines and other equipment. Incorporated on 3rd of March, 2009, it shares the philosophy of total quality and commitment with the development of those communities where it operates and maximum respect for execution terms and clients budgets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Specialist & Website Manager

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Build, manage, and update the company websites.
	Handle website maintenance and troubleshoot technical issues.
	Improve site speed, performance, and user experience UX.
	Manage web hosting, domain, and company email accounts.
	Ensure website security and regular backups.
	Add/update content in coordination with Sales & Marketing team.


Requirements


	Proven experience building and managing websites on WordPress or other CMS platforms.
	Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript is a plus.
	Experience with web hosting and cPanel.
	Organized, fast learner, and able to work under pressure.
	Lagos-based candidates preferred.


Benefits


	Competitive salary based on experience.
	Stable work environment + continuous training.
	Career growth opportunities within the company.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Ifgreen is an integrated agro-allied processing, major focus is on processing cassava into staple food products and industrial food solutions. Also produce gluten-free flour and &ldquo;clean-label&rdquo; functional foods

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer

Job Location: Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Inspect raw materials and finished products to ensure quality compliance.
	Monitor production processes and report any quality issues.
	Conduct routine quality checks and maintain quality records.
	Ensure adherence to hygiene, safety, and quality standards.
	Identify defects and recommend corrective actions.
	Prepare quality control reports and documentation.
	Work closely with the Production team to maintain product quality.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to: o_iwasokun@ifgreenindustries.com using &quot;Application for Quality Control Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Quality Control Officer Job at IFGREEN industries and Investment limited




        
    

        
        Ifgreen is an integrated agro-allied processing, major focus is on processing cassava into staple food products and industrial food solutions. Also produce gluten-free flour and “clean-label” functional foods

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer

Job Location: Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Inspect raw materials and finished products to ensure quality compliance.
	Monitor production processes and report any quality issues.
	Conduct routine quality checks and maintain quality records.
	Ensure adherence to hygiene, safety, and quality standards.
	Identify defects and recommend corrective actions.
	Prepare quality control reports and documentation.
	Work closely with the Production team to maintain product quality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to: [email protected] using "Application for Quality Control Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Experienced Cashier (Female)",
  "description": "J3 Foods and Store International is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence over 8 years. J3 has branches in several locations; Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Experienced Cashier (Female)

Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Receive and respond promptly to all customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, email, or in person.
	Maintain professional and friendly communication at all times.
	Confirm customer orders, verify item availability, and ensure order accuracy.
	Log and follow up on all orders to ensure timely processing and dispatch.
	Work directly with the MD to build and maintain relationships with direct buyers.
	Ensure top-tier service is provided to these buyers, with proactive order follow-up and issue resolution.
	Maintain records of direct buyer history, such as: preferences, purchase quantity, and feedback.
	Liaise with the warehouse and logistics teams to track order status and ensure timely delivery.
	Communicate clearly to customers on dispatch status, delivery timelines, and any delays.
	Handle all customer complaints quickly and professionally, escalating where necessary to the Head HR/Admin or MD.
	Keep a record of complaints and how they were resolved.
	Maintain and update an organized customer database (especially for direct buyers and repeat clients).
	Track regular buying customers, flag inactive ones, and recommend re-engagement steps.
	Share insights and feedback from customers with the marketing and sales teams.
	Suggest improvements based on repeated customer concerns or requests.


Salary
N80,000 - N90,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: midaasconsult@gmail.com using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact on WhatsApp 09152781100.",

Customer Experienced Cashier (Female) Job at J3 Foods and Store International




        
    

        
        J3 Foods and Store International is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence over 8 years. J3 has branches in several locations; Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Experienced Cashier (Female)

Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Receive and respond promptly to all customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, email, or in person.
	Maintain professional and friendly communication at all times.
	Confirm customer orders, verify item availability, and ensure order accuracy.
	Log and follow up on all orders to ensure timely processing and dispatch.
	Work directly with the MD to build and maintain relationships with direct buyers.
	Ensure top-tier service is provided to these buyers, with proactive order follow-up and issue resolution.
	Maintain records of direct buyer history, such as: preferences, purchase quantity, and feedback.
	Liaise with the warehouse and logistics teams to track order status and ensure timely delivery.
	Communicate clearly to customers on dispatch status, delivery timelines, and any delays.
	Handle all customer complaints quickly and professionally, escalating where necessary to the Head HR/Admin or MD.
	Keep a record of complaints and how they were resolved.
	Maintain and update an organized customer database (especially for direct buyers and repeat clients).
	Track regular buying customers, flag inactive ones, and recommend re-engagement steps.
	Share insights and feedback from customers with the marketing and sales teams.
	Suggest improvements based on repeated customer concerns or requests.


Salary
N80,000 - N90,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact on WhatsApp 09152781100.
